hooks.command: sh -c 'AIDLC=$(command -v aidlc 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$AIDLC" ] && { AIDLC_HARNESS_DIR=.claude "$AIDLC" plugin sync; exit $?; }; BUN=$(command -v bun 2>/dev/null || true); [ -z "$BUN" ] && [ -x "$HOME/.bun/bin/bun" ] && BUN="$HOME/.bun/bin/bun"; [ -z "$BUN" ] && { echo "aidlc plugin compose: aidlc and bun not found, skipping" >&2; exit 0; }; PROJECT_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-${AIDLC_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}}"; PLUGIN_TOOL="$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/tools/aidlc-plugin.ts"; [ -f "$PLUGIN_TOOL" ] && { AIDLC_HARNESS_DIR=.claude "$BUN" "$PLUGIN_TOOL" sync; exit $?; }; AIDLC_HARNESS_DIR=.claude "$BUN" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/compose.ts"'
